name: Krystal Biotech, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a fully integrated, global, commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery, development, manufacturing and commercialization of genetic medicines to treat diseases with high unmet medical needs. Using our patented gene therapy technology platform that is based on engineered herpes simplex virus-1 (HSV-1), we create vectors that efficiently deliver therapeutic transgenes to cells of interest in multiple organ systems.
